Memory Gallery 📸
A Little Note 💌
from someone who cares
Dear Srija,

On this beautiful day, I just want you to know how incredibly special you are. Your smile has a way of lighting up every room you walk into, and your presence makes everything brighter and better.

You deserve every bit of happiness that comes your way — the kind that fills your heart to the brim and makes your eyes sparkle. May this year bring you adventures, laughter, and all the beautiful surprises you never saw coming.

Thank you for being you. The world is genuinely a more wonderful place because you're in it. Happy Birthday, Srija! 🎂🎉
— With love & best wishes 🌸
